name: mobisys-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM MobiSys submissions: mobile-systems topic fit, HotCRP submission audit, the two-round + rebuttal response, ACM-badge artifact evaluation, on-device reproducibility, supplementary packaging, review-process modeling, 12-page writing, related-work coverage, real-device experiments, workflow, and sibling routing. Grounded in the official MobiSys 2026 CFP, artifact-evaluation and organizing-committee pages on sigmobile.org, the mobisys26.hotcrp.com deadlines, ACM Digital Library, and dblp, verified 2026-07-09.
